text:
(skip pattern) effective10/01/2016
644 GG0130A1_EATG_ABILITY_STRT_CD GG0130A1_EATG_ABILITY_STRT_CD GG0130A1 Self Care: Eating Ability at Start of SNF PPS Part A Stay CHAR 2 Indicates the resident's performance for self-feeding at the start of the SNF PPS Part A stay. -=Not assessed/no information
 01=Dependent
 02=Substantial/maximal assistance
 03=Partial/moderate assistance
 04=Supervision or touching assistance
 05=Setup or clean-up assistance
 06=Independent
 07=Resident refused
 09=Not
